title: PB-152 VERIFIED: Governance Runtime Hardening Blocker Resolution
scope: Governance runtime hardening blocker resolution for Edgeguard subprocess dependency context.

failure_cause.observed_failure: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'cryptography' inside demos/edgeguard/reset_demo.sh subprocess while cryptography exists in active pytest environment.
failure_cause.root_cause: reset_demo.sh executed hardcoded python3 instead of the active pytest/virtualenv interpreter, so subprocess dependency context could diverge from validation context.

fix_summary: demos/edgeguard/reset_demo.sh now uses USBAY_PYTHON when provided.
demos/edgeguard/reset_demo.sh falls back to VIRTUAL_ENV/bin/python before command -v python3.
demos/edgeguard/reset_demo.sh fails closed if the selected interpreter is unavailable or not executable.
reset audit entries include python_executable for deterministic replay and auditability.
tests/test_edgeguard_demo.py passes sys.executable through USBAY_PYTHON and verifies the reset audit log recorded the pytest interpreter.
validation_commands_planned: conflict marker scan over demos/edgeguard, tests/test_edgeguard_demo.py, and governance/evidence/pb152
